{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-50149", "cvss": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-295", "name": "Improper Certificate Validation"}], "description": "### Impact

When an `HTTPProxy` is configured with incompatible combination of both `.spec.virtualhost.tls.enableFallbackCertificate: true` and `.spec.virtualhost.jwtProviders`, Contour does not reject the configuration. Consequently, requests from clients that do not send TLS SNI or send an unrecognized SNI (one that does not match any `HTTPProxy` FQDN) bypass configured JWT verification and are proxied to upstream services without a valid token.

To list all `HTTPProxies` with this invalid configuration, run

```bash
kubectl get httpproxies -A -o json | jq -r '
  .items[]
  | select(.spec.virtualhost | .tls.enableFallbackCertificate and .jwtProviders)
  | "Invalid HTTPProxy found: \(.metadata.namespace)/\(.metadata.name)"
'
```

### Patches

This issue is fixed in Contour v1.33.5. Contour now rejects and marks invalid any `HTTPProxy` resources that combine `.spec.virtualhost.tls.enableFallbackCertificate: true` with `.spec.virtualhost.jwtProviders`. Affected resources will receive a status  condition with the error reason `TLSIncompatibleFeatures`.

### Workarounds

Do not enable `.spec.virtualhost.tls.enableFallbackCertificate` on `HTTPProxy` resources that also define `.spec.virtualhost.jwtProviders`. Remove one of the two settings to avoid the invalid configuration.

### References

- Contour fallback certificate documentation: https://projectcontour.io/docs/main/config/tls-termination/#fallback-certificate
- Contour JWT verification documentation: https://projectcontour.io/docs/main/config/jwt-verification/", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00023, "percentile": 0.06809}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-g3xr-5w5j-w4q4", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-02T17:15:20Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-g3xr-5w5j-w4q4", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-g3xr-5w5j-w4q4"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-50149"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-02T17:15:20Z", "references": ["https://github.com/projectcontour/contour/security/advisories/GHSA-g3xr-5w5j-w4q4", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-g3xr-5w5j-w4q4"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/projectcontour/contour/security-advisories/GHSA-g3xr-5w5j-w4q4", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/projectcontour/contour", "summary": "Contour has Improper JWT Verification for Non-SNI Requests on Virtual Hosts with Fallback Certificate Enabled", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-02T17:15:23Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-g3xr-5w5j-w4q4", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.33.5", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/projectcontour/contour"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 1.23.0, < 1.33.5"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Contour has Improper JWT Verification for Non-SNI Requests on Virtual Hosts with Fallback Certificate Enabled
